case_title: KELLY POWERS VS. WEAVER PUBLICATIONS, INC, A COLORADO CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF POWERS, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT WEAVER PUBLICATIONS, INC, A COLORADO CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POWERS, KELLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEAVER PUBLICATIONS, INC, A COLORADO CORPORATION $10,024.77 PRINCIPAL, $33.37 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,428.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
